headline: Friday, Day 188 — Frankie’s PT morning, and the last weekday window before the weekend to clear the one act that unlocks everything: post Batch 1 to the LinkedIn pages. It’s been post-ready since Tuesday while the +430% search bump lands on a blank page and bounces — the instant a real feed is live, every gated PhantomBuster sequence can fire. Two more owed today: the Mercedes receipts-reply, now a full week overdue, and the founder-ad + insurance scripts — because Fable access lapses Sunday (Jul 19), so the script clock is down to 48 hours.

realestate.blurb: Investor / seller real-estate lead engine (next project, in design).

spotlight.title: Post Batch 1 today — a blank LinkedIn page is bleeding the +430% search bump
spotlight.detail: The single highest-leverage move on the board, and the one gate you can clear yourselves this morning — and it’s Friday, the last weekday window before the weekend. All PhantomBuster outreach is gated until the company page shows real posted content — “if that is empty, they’re not going to take you serious.” Hanflux AI search appearances are up 430% on the name alone, and every one of those visitors is hitting a blank page and leaving. Batch 1 (~6 reels) was declared ready Jul 12. Move: mutually select the reels, post to both personal and company pages — that checks agenda item a3 and lets the first Phantom (connect-request vs page-invite) launch the same day. Seed goal: 2,500 combined follows (C ~400→1,000, F →1,000–1,500).

spotlight.title: Send the Mercedes receipts-reply — it’s been ours to send for a full week now
spotlight.detail: They finally replied (“this is a sign”) and the ball has sat in our court since Jul 10 — seven days. The locked play (Decision Jul 9): reply with timestamped screenshots of the multi-day delay on their own site’s chatbot, pitch voice AI + automation against exactly that gap, then have the agent itself place the call and book the demo. Frankie holds the delay screenshots. “We’re too soft — that is costing us.” Draft the reply and book the live agent-demo call today, before a warm dealership thread goes cold.

spotlight.title: Founder-ad + insurance scripts — Fable lapses Sunday, the clock is 48 hours
spotlight.detail: Frankie: run P6 (founder-ad master outline) and P7 (insurance brief) through Fable on the shared account, annotate visual cues per the P12 format, and lock whether Fable or Opus drafts scripts going forward — access lapses Jul 19, so this is the test-or-lose window. Chitraksh: attach the video-gen MCP + ingest the P10 feedback block, then generate Batch 3 — 6–7 insurance-vertical reels (Frankie’s real Mutual-of-Omaha story; opt-in framing keeps it legally light) plus the Batch-2 fixes (consultancy voice everywhere, TCPA subtitles off key visuals, new DMS tagline, no blank end screens). Target 12–13 for next review.

blockers.label: LinkedIn content gate
blockers.detail: The one gate standing between the company and live outreach — and the one you can clear today. PhantomBuster connect-requests and page-invites do NOT launch until the company page has real posted content (“if that is empty, they’re not going to take you serious”). Unblock path: mutually select and post Batch 1 to the personal + company pages. The instant that’s live, the first Phantom can go the same day.

blockers.label: Insurance funnel — compliance gate + EIN
blockers.detail: The p2-insurance consumer funnel stays blocked on 7 compliance items (CA + TX data-broker registration, TX SB 140 bond, TCPA counsel red-team, privacy / Do-Not-Sell page, CCPA assessment, CA producer # in every email) — those are founder spend + counsel calls, not build. The EIN re-fax window closed Jul 11 with zero signal, so it’s now a phone chase: call the IRS EIN line + check RedFax (510-497-1224) in the 8 AM PT window. A2P → FBN → SMS stays queued behind it. Keep this lane fully separate from Oraya’s own B2B marketing (reels, LinkedIn) — that lane is NOT gated by any of this.

blockers.label: Autoloop frozen + dead keys
blockers.detail: The autoloop has sat frozen at cycle 10 for 19 days on a launchd Full Disk Access denial — a ~2-minute Mac toggle (System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access). While in there: overwrite the dead ATTOM key (401 since Jun 27) and fund BatchData (~$25) to switch on skip-trace. None of these gate the marketing lane, but they’re the cheapest infra wins on the board.

tasks.lead: Mutually select + post Batch 1 to personal + company pages
tasks.detail: The gate-opener, and it’s Friday — do it before the weekend. Pick the reels together and post to both pages; that unblocks every PhantomBuster sequence and checks agenda a3. Right now the +430% search bump is landing on a blank page and bouncing.

tasks.lead: Send the Mercedes re-pitch reply + book the live agent-demo call
tasks.detail: Their reply is in and it’s been ours to answer for a full week (since Jul 10). Attach the timestamped screenshots of their own chatbot’s multi-day delay, pitch voice AI + automation against that exact gap, then have the agent place the booking call itself. You hold the screenshots.

tasks.lead: Draft the founder-intro ad (P6) + insurance reel (P7) in Fable
tasks.detail: Run the P6 master outline and the P7 insurance brief through Fable (or Opus) on the shared account, annotate visual cues per the P12 format, then hand finished scripts + footage to Chitraksh for Batch 3. Two verticals, 30-day-free-trial offer, real Mutual-of-Omaha commission screenshots as proof.

tasks.lead: IRS EIN call + check RedFax in the 8 AM PT window
tasks.detail: The re-fax window closed Jul 11 with zero signal — the EIN gets chased by phone now. Call the IRS EIN line, check RedFax (510-497-1224); Chitraksh rides the India-side rotation earlier. A2P → FBN → SMS unblocks the moment the number lands.

tasks.lead: Scan your network for a US investor (Jharkhand data center)
tasks.detail: Father’s direct access to CM Hemant Soren is the moat — even a $10–20M ticket ‘gets the best deal in the country,’ and the investor gets deal + optics. Chitraksh builds the landing page + downloadable brochure in parallel.

tasks.lead: Attach the video-gen MCP + ingest P10 → generate Batch 3 (12–13 reels)
tasks.detail: Ingest the P10 feedback block into the growth engine, then generate: 6–7 insurance-vertical reels + the revised Batch 2. Standardize on the consultancy-reel voice; no blank end screens. Target 12–13 for next review.

tasks.lead: Prep the first Phantom to launch — the moment Batch 1 posts
tasks.detail: Connect-request vs page-invite; you can start same day once the page has content. Free tier has ~2h execution left with multi-account rotation. Seed goal 2,500 combined follows.

tasks.lead: Clear the 2-min autoloop unlock + dead keys
tasks.detail: Full Disk Access toggle (System Settings → Privacy & Security) to unfreeze the autoloop (cycle 10, now day 19). While in there: overwrite the dead ATTOM key (401) and fund BatchData (~$25) for skip-trace.

tasks.lead: Fix the TCPA reel + regenerate the DMS reel
tasks.detail: TCPA: copy is approved (‘that’s fire’) — regenerate visuals so captions never overlay key footage, and name the on-screen certifications. DMS: rebuild with the consultancy-reel voice; have the growth engine propose 2–3 new end-card taglines (old one rejected as ‘horrible’).

tasks.lead: Build the Jharkhand landing page + downloadable brochure
tasks.detail: Frankie’s brochure artifact is done — wrap it in a capture-funnel landing page (brochure as the gated download) while he scans for the US investor.

tasks.lead: IRS EIN rotation 8–11 AM PT (8:30–11:30 PM IST)
tasks.detail: Ride out the auto-disconnects, retry until a live agent picks up; certified-mail / RedFax track running parallel. Frankie picks up post-day-job.

tasks.lead: Published the Day 188 PM brief (this one)
tasks.detail: Curated from the v15.1 ‘Signal’ DATA block — the v14 auto-parse (Envision Honda / Day-138 / ‘v12.0 dashboard’) was fully replaced across headline, all 3 spotlight items and all three lanes. No AM edition ran Jul 17, so this brief restores the twice-daily cadence. Live page pushed to Vercel + Gmail draft to both founders.
0 flagged, zero threads in 72h+ (in:inbox still ~21, newest unchanged since the Jun 26 Anthropic notice — the quiet is real, not an auth failure). Nothing needed a reply; zero drafts queued.
The ‘~8 business day’ re-fax window closed Jul 11 with no signal; monitoring for any IRS / RedFax (510-497-1224) reply and will draft on any hit. A2P → FBN → SMS chain stays queued behind it.

tasks.lead: Autoloop still dark — waiting on the 2-min toggle
tasks.detail: Re-verified frozen at cycle 10, now day 19; launchd retries still fail ‘Operation not permitted’, state.json untouched since Jun 28. Zero autonomous build cycles until Chitraksh clears the Full Disk Access denial.

Auto-flagging EIN/IRS mail, dealership replies (Mercedes / Envision), LinkedIn-post confirmation and any opt-in signal; will draft a reply on any hit. Nothing actionable since the Jun 26 Anthropic notice.
No permission-asking on routine tasks; multi-model fallback (ChatGPT + Gemini on shadow) stays armed during any Anthropic outage.

done.what: Ran the Fri Jul 17 PM brief — curated it from the v15.1 ‘Signal’ DATA block (the source of truth) rather than the frozen v14 board the generator still parses mechanically; rebuilt the email + WebGL page, published to Vercel via a fresh unique /tmp clone, dropped the Gmail draft, appended the brief log.

Fully replaced the stale auto-parse: the mechanical v14 parse still emits the May-28 board (Envision Honda walk-in / ‘v12.0 dashboard’ / Day 138) — swapped in the current content-engine work across the headline, all 3 spotlight must-dos, and all three lane task lists.
Cadence: no AM edition ran Jul 17 (last artifact was the Jul 16 PM brief) — this PM edition restores the twice-daily cadence, first brief in ~23h.

Inbox: 5th straight quiet sweep — 0 flagged, zero threads in 72h+ (in:inbox ~21, newest unchanged since the Jun 26 Anthropic notice, so the quiet is real, not an auth failure). Nothing needed a reply; zero drafts queued.

EIN: the re-fax window (out Jun 28) closed Jul 11 and still shows zero signal — stays reframed from a wait into an action: call the IRS EIN line + check RedFax (510-497-1224) in the 8 AM PT window. A2P → FBN → SMS chain stays queued behind it.
Autoloop: re-verified still frozen at cycle 10, now day 19 — launchd retries still fail ‘Operation not permitted’, state.json untouched since Jun 28; root cause (Full Disk Access) unchanged.

waiting.what: POST Batch 1 to the LinkedIn pages (personal + company) — the keystone that opens EVERY PhantomBuster sequence; a live feed is the hard gate and Batch 1 was declared ready Jul 12. Friday is the last weekday window before the weekend.
SEND the Mercedes re-pitch reply + book the live agent-demo call — overdue since Jul 10 (7 days); lead with their own chatbot’s multi-day delay screenshots.
DRAFT the founder-ad (P6) + insurance (P7) scripts in Fable and lock Fable-vs-Opus — access lapses Sun Jul 19, so the script clock is 48 hours.
CALL the IRS EIN line + check RedFax (510-497-1224) in the 8 AM PT window — the fax window closed Jul 11 with no signal; it gets chased by phone now.
2-min Full Disk Access toggle to unfreeze the autoloop (day 19 frozen at cycle 10): System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access for the launchd runner.
